name: Mira
text: Well played. You changed your line instead of forcing the draw.

name: Selkie
text: Moon taught me that people are not problems with one solution.

name: Mira
text: Remember it when the winning move looks like choosing for her.

name: Selkie
text: Then I will ask, and listen.

name: Mira
text: Good. The Lantern path is yours. Leave room in the story for her card.
